Then we can maybe read some files. But the instruction: Output ONLY the UCL command(s), no explanations. So we need to output a JSON with kind "tool_call" (or maybe "think")? The shape: {"kind":"think|tool_call|complete","prompt_version":"v1","model_slug":"<provider model id>","provider":"<provider slug>","assistant_message":"<brief status>","tool_call":{"tool_name":"<one registered tool name>","payload":{}},"acquired_fact_ids":[],"readiness_state":"not_ready|evidence_visible|evidence_acquired|ready_to_edit"}.

Thus output JSON with kind "tool_call", tool_name "search", payload empty? Must provide payload with pattern? According to tool contract, search payload includes pattern string and optional path. So we can provide {"pattern":"schema_version"}.
